# VelopackAsset struct

An individual Velopack asset, could refer to an asset on-disk or in a remote package feed.

```cpp
struct VelopackAsset
```

## Fields

| Field | Summary |
| --- | --- |
| [`PackageId`](#packageid) | The name or Id of the package containing this release. |
| [`Version`](#version) | The version of this release. |
| [`Type`](#type) | The type of asset (eg. “Full” or “Delta”). |
| [`FileName`](#filename) | The filename of the update package containing this release. |
| [`SHA1`](#sha1) | The SHA1 checksum of the update package containing this release. |
| [`SHA256`](#sha256) | The SHA256 checksum of the update package containing this release. |
| [`Size`](#size) | The size in bytes of the update package containing this release. |
| [`NotesMarkdown`](#notesmarkdown) | The release notes in markdown format, as passed to Velopack when packaging the release. This may be an empty string. |
| [`NotesHtml`](#noteshtml) | The release notes in HTML format, transformed from Markdown when packaging the release. This may be an empty string. |


### PackageId {#packageid}

The name or Id of the package containing this release.

### Version {#version}

The version of this release.

### Type {#type}

The type of asset (eg. “Full” or “Delta”).

### FileName {#filename}

The filename of the update package containing this release.

### SHA1 {#sha1}

The SHA1 checksum of the update package containing this release.

### SHA256 {#sha256}

The SHA256 checksum of the update package containing this release.

### Size {#size}

The size in bytes of the update package containing this release.

### NotesMarkdown {#notesmarkdown}

The release notes in markdown format, as passed to Velopack when packaging the release. This may be an empty string.

### NotesHtml {#noteshtml}

The release notes in HTML format, transformed from Markdown when packaging the release. This may be an empty string.
